       49
       50 ---
       51
       52 ## 3. 关键设计决策
       53
       54 ### 3.1 物化触发条件
       55 ```
       56 quality_level >= 1 AND structured_md != ""
       57 ```
       58 在 `scheduler.rs` 的 `Ok(Ok(extraction_result))` 分支末尾，同步执行（不另启协程）。
       59
       60 ### 3.2 衍生 Asset 路径
       61 ```
       62 ~/Downloads/NoteCaptWorkPlace/<project_id>/<derived_asset_id>_<stem>.md
       63 ```
       64 - `<stem>` 取自原件 `asset.name` 的 file_stem
       65 - 路径与其他工作区文件一致，前端 `WorkspaceFolderStrip` 可正常枚举
       66
       67 ### 3.3 衍生 Asset 字段
       68 ```rust
       69 Asset {
       70     asset_type: "markdown",
       71     source_type: "converted_from",
       72     source_data: Some(source_asset_id),   // 冗余，便于旧代码读取
       73     source_asset_id: Some(source_asset_id),
       74     mime_type: "text/markdown",
       75     ...
       76 }
       77 ```
       78
       79 ### 3.4 失败降级策略
       80 写出 .md 或插入衍生 Asset 失败时：
       81 - 仅 `log::warn!`，不阻断主流程
       82 - 若文件写出成功但 DB 写入失败，删除磁盘文件（保持一致性）
       83
       84 ### 3.5 ASR FFI 策略
       85 - 编译为独立静态库 `libasr_bridge.a`（与 `libocr_bridge.a` 分离）
       86 - 使用 `DispatchSemaphore` 将 async SFSpeechRecognizer 转为同步 FFI 调用
       87 - 超时保护：600 秒（适合 10 分钟以内录音）
       88 - 非 macOS：`audio_asr.rs` 的 `can_handle` 永返 false，整个 ASR 路径编译时排除
       89
       90 ### 3.6 MIME 类型
       91 | 扩展名 | asset_type | mime_type |
       92 |--------|-----------|-----------|
       93 | .docx | "document" | "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document"
          |
       94 | .pptx | "presentation" | "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presenta
          tion" |
       95 | .mp3 | "audio_clip" | "audio/mpeg" |（已有）
       96 | .m4a/.aac | "audio_clip" | "audio/mp4" |（已有）
       97 | .wav | "audio_clip" | "audio/wav" |（已有）
       98
       99 ---
      100
      101 ## 4. 接口规范
      102
      103 ### `db::asset::insert`（不变签名，内部增加 source_asset_id 列）
      104 ```rust
      105 pub fn insert(conn: &Connection, a: &Asset) -> Result<(), String>
      106 ```
      107
      108 ### `notecapt/asset-converted` 事件 payload
      109 ```json
      110 {
      111   "sourceAssetId": "uuid",
      112   "derivedAssetId": "uuid",
      113   "projectId": "uuid"
      114 }
      115 ```
      116
      117 ### ASR FFI（Rust 侧）
      118 ```rust
      119 // macos/asr_ffi.rs
      120 pub fn transcribe_audio(path: &Path) -> Result<String, String>
      121 ```
      122
      123 ---
      124
      125 ## 5. 风险提示
      126
      127 | 风险 | 缓解 |
      128 |------|------|
      129 | SFSpeechRecognizer 授权弹窗 | 首次调用时系统自动弹出；Info.plist 需加 NSSpeechRecognitionUsageD
          escription |
      130 | quick-xml crate 编译时间增加 | 可接受，与 zip crate 一起引入 |
      131 | PPTX 幻灯片顺序不确定 | slide 文件名排序后按序解析，如 slide1.xml < slide2.xml < slide10.xml（
          自然数排序） |
      132 | 衍生 MD 重复创建 | scheduler 每次成功提取都会尝试创建，通过检查同 project_id + source_asset_id
          是否已存在来防重（本期简化：直接插入，利用 DB 唯一约束）|
      133
      134 > 注：本期「重复创建」问题通过 DB 层唯一索引解决方案可在 V7 migration 中补充；本期 V6 先不加 UNIQ
          UE 约束，让旧数据无影响。

⏺ Write(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/extraction/extrac
       tors/docx.rs)                                  
  ⎿  Wrote 176 lines to /Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/
     src/extraction/extractors/docx.rs                                                                            
        1 use std::io::Read;                          
        2 use std::path::Path;                                                                                    
        3                                                                                                         
        4 use quick_xml::events::Event;                                                                         
        5 use quick_xml::Reader;                                                                                  
        6                                                                                                       
        7 use crate::extraction::{                                                                              
        8     models::{ContentSegment, ExtractionError, ExtractionResult, ExtractOptions},
        9     Extractor,
       10 };
       11
       12 pub struct DocxExtractor;
       13
       14 impl Extractor for DocxExtractor {
       15     fn can_handle(&self, mime_type: &str) -> bool {
       16         mime_type == "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document"
       17     }
       18
       19     fn name(&self) -> &'static str {
       20         "docx"
       21     }
       22
       23     fn extract(
       24         &self,
       25         file_path: &Path,
       26         _options: &ExtractOptions,
       27     ) -> Result<ExtractionResult, ExtractionError> {
       28         let file = std::fs::File::open(file_path)?;
       29         let mut archive = zip::ZipArchive::new(file)
       30             .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("DOCX zip 打开失败: {e}")))?;
       31
       32         // 读取 word/document.xml
       33         let xml_content = {
       34             let mut entry = archive
       35                 .by_name("word/document.xml")
       36                 .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("找不到 word/document.xml: {e}")
          ))?;
       37             let mut buf = String::new();
       38             entry
       39                 .read_to_string(&mut buf)
       40                 .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("读取 document.xml 失败: {e}")))
          ?;
       41             buf
       42         };
       43
       44         let paragraphs = extract_paragraphs_from_docx_xml(&xml_content)?;
       45
       46         if paragraphs.is_empty() {
       47             return Ok(ExtractionResult {
       48                 raw_text: String::new(),
       49                 structured_md: String::new(),
       50                 quality_level: 0,
       51                 extractor_type: "docx".to_string(),
       52                 segments: vec![],
       53                 needs_ocr_fallback: false,
       54             });
       55         }
       56
       57         let segments: Vec<ContentSegment> = paragraphs
       58             .iter()
       59             .enumerate()
       60             .map(|(i, p)| ContentSegment {
       61                 segment_type: "paragraph".to_string(),
       62                 content: p.clone(),
       63                 page: Some((i as u32 / 10) + 1),
       64                 confidence: None,
       65                 bbox: None,
       66             })
       67             .collect();
       68
       69         let raw_text = paragraphs.join("\n");
       70         let structured_md = paragraphs.join("\n\n");
       71
       72         Ok(ExtractionResult {
       73             raw_text,
       74             structured_md,
       75             quality_level: 1,
       76             extractor_type: "docx".to_string(),
       77             segments,
       78             needs_ocr_fallback: false,
       79         })
       80     }
       81 }
       82
       83 /// 从 word/document.xml 的 XML 字符串中提取段落文字
       84 fn extract_paragraphs_from_docx_xml(xml: &str) -> Result<Vec<String>, ExtractionError> {
       85     let mut reader = Reader::from_str(xml);
       86     reader.config_mut().trim_text(true);
       87
       88     let mut paragraphs: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
       89     let mut current_para = String::new();
       90     let mut in_w_t = false;
       91     let mut buf = Vec::new();
       92
       93     loop {
       94         match reader.read_event_into(&mut buf) {
       95             Ok(Event::Start(ref e)) => {
       96                 // <w:p> — 新段落开始
       97                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"w:p" {
       98                     current_para.clear();
       99                 }
      100                 // <w:t> — 文字节点开始
      101                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"w:t" {
      102                     in_w_t = true;
      103                 }
      104             }
      105             Ok(Event::Text(ref e)) if in_w_t => {
      106                 let text = e
      107                     .unescape()
      108                     .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("XML 解码失败: {e}")))?;
      109                 current_para.push_str(&text);
      110             }
      111             Ok(Event::End(ref e)) => {
      112                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"w:t" {
      113                     in_w_t = false;
      114                 }
      115                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"w:p" {
      116                     let trimmed = current_para.trim().to_string();
      117                     if !trimmed.is_empty() {
      118                         paragraphs.push(trimmed);
      119                     }
      120                     current_para.clear();
      121                 }
      122             }
      123             Ok(Event::Empty(ref e)) => {
      124                 // 处理自闭合的 <w:t/>（通常是空格）
      125                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"w:t" {
      126                     // 空文字节点，不处理
      127                 }
      128             }
      129             Ok(Event::Eof) => break,
      130             Err(e) => {
      131                 return Err(ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("DOCX XML 解析失败: {e}")));
      132             }
      133             _ => {}
      134         }
      135         buf.clear();
      136     }
      137
      138     Ok(paragraphs)
      139 }
      140
      141 #[cfg(test)]
      142 mod tests {
      143     use super::*;
      144
      145     #[test]
      146     fn test_extract_paragraphs_empty_xml() {
      147         let xml = r#"<?xml version="1.0"?><w:document><w:body></w:body></w:document>"#;
      148         let result = extract_paragraphs_from_docx_xml(xml).unwrap();
      149         assert!(result.is_empty());
      150     }
      151
      152     #[test]
      153     fn test_extract_paragraphs_with_text() {
      154         let xml = r#"<?xml version="1.0"?>
      155 <w:document xmlns:w="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main">
      156   <w:body>
      157     <w:p><w:r><w:t>Hello World</w:t></w:r></w:p>
      158     <w:p><w:r><w:t>Second paragraph</w:t></w:r></w:p>
      159   </w:body>
      160 </w:document>"#;
      161         let result = extract_paragraphs_from_docx_xml(xml).unwrap();
      162         assert_eq!(result.len(), 2);
      163         assert_eq!(result[0], "Hello World");
      164         assert_eq!(result[1], "Second paragraph");
      165     }

      167     #[test]
      168     fn test_docx_extractor_can_handle() {
      169         let extractor = DocxExtractor;
      170         assert!(extractor.can_handle(
      171             "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document"
      172         ));
      173         assert!(!extractor.can_handle("application/pdf"));
      174         assert!(!extractor.can_handle(""));
      175     }

⏺ Now implement T04 — pptx extractor:                              
                                                      
⏺ Write(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/extraction/extrac
       tors/pptx.rs)                                                                                              
  ⎿  Wrote 239 lines to /Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/
     src/extraction/extractors/pptx.rs                                                                            
        1 use std::io::Read;                                                                                    
        2 use std::path::Path;                                                                                    
        3                                                                                                         
        4 use quick_xml::events::Event;                                                                         
        5 use quick_xml::Reader;                                                                                  
        6                                                                                                       
        7 use crate::extraction::{                                                                              
        8     models::{ContentSegment, ExtractionError, ExtractionResult, ExtractOptions},
        9     Extractor,
       10 };
       11
       12 pub struct PptxExtractor;
       13
       14 impl Extractor for PptxExtractor {
       15     fn can_handle(&self, mime_type: &str) -> bool {
       16         mime_type
       17             == "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation"
       18     }
       19
       20     fn name(&self) -> &'static str {
       21         "pptx"
       22     }
       23
       24     fn extract(
       25         &self,
       26         file_path: &Path,
       27         _options: &ExtractOptions,
       28     ) -> Result<ExtractionResult, ExtractionError> {
       29         let file = std::fs::File::open(file_path)?;
       30         let mut archive = zip::ZipArchive::new(file)
       31             .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("PPTX zip 打开失败: {e}")))?;
       32
       33         // 枚举所有 ppt/slides/slide*.xml 文件名，按自然数排序
       34         let mut slide_names: Vec<String> = (0..archive.len())
       35             .filter_map(|i| {
       36                 let entry = archive.by_index(i).ok()?;
       37                 let name = entry.name().to_string();
       38                 if name.starts_with("ppt/slides/slide")
       39                     && name.ends_with(".xml")
       40                     && !name.contains("_rels")
       41                     && !name.contains("slideLayout")
       42                     && !name.contains("slideMaster")
       43                 {
       44                     Some(name)
       45                 } else {
       46                     None
       47                 }
       48             })
       49             .collect();
       50
       51         // 自然数排序：slide1.xml < slide2.xml < ... < slide10.xml
       52         slide_names.sort_by(|a, b| {
       53             let num_a = extract_slide_number(a);
       54             let num_b = extract_slide_number(b);
       55             num_a.cmp(&num_b)
       56         });
       57
       58         if slide_names.is_empty() {
       59             return Ok(ExtractionResult {
       60                 raw_text: String::new(),
       61                 structured_md: String::new(),
       62                 quality_level: 0,
       63                 extractor_type: "pptx".to_string(),
       64                 segments: vec![],
       65                 needs_ocr_fallback: false,
       66             });
       67         }
       68
       69         let mut all_segments: Vec<ContentSegment> = Vec::new();
       70         let mut md_sections: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
       71
       72         for (slide_idx, slide_name) in slide_names.iter().enumerate() {
       73             let slide_num = slide_idx + 1;
       74
       75             let xml_content = {
       76                 let mut entry = archive
       77                     .by_name(slide_name)
       78                     .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("读取幻灯片 {slide_name} 失
          败: {e}")))?;
       79                 let mut buf = String::new();
       80                 entry
       81                     .read_to_string(&mut buf)
       82                     .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("读取幻灯片 XML 失败: {e}"))
          )?;
       83                 buf
       84             };
       85
       86             let texts = extract_texts_from_pptx_slide_xml(&xml_content)?;
       87
       88             if texts.is_empty() {
       89                 continue;
       90             }
       91
       92             // 每张幻灯片生成一个 ## 二级标题段
       93             let mut section = format!("## Slide {slide_num}");
       94             for text in &texts {
       95                 section.push('\n');
       96                 section.push_str(text);
       97             }
       98             md_sections.push(section);
       99
      100             for text in texts {
      101                 all_segments.push(ContentSegment {
      102                     segment_type: "slide_text".to_string(),
      103                     content: text,
      104                     page: Some(slide_num as u32),
      105                     confidence: None,
      106                     bbox: None,
      107                 });
      108             }
      109         }
      110
      111         if md_sections.is_empty() {
      112             return Ok(ExtractionResult {
      113                 raw_text: String::new(),
      114                 structured_md: String::new(),
      115                 quality_level: 0,
      116                 extractor_type: "pptx".to_string(),
      117                 segments: vec![],
      118                 needs_ocr_fallback: false,
      119             });
      120         }
      121
      122         let raw_text = all_segments
      123             .iter()
      124             .map(|s| s.content.as_str())
      125             .collect::<Vec<_>>()
      126             .join("\n");
      127
      128         let structured_md = md_sections.join("\n\n");
      129
      130         Ok(ExtractionResult {
      131             raw_text,
      132             structured_md,
      133             quality_level: 2, // 有结构（## 标题）
      134             extractor_type: "pptx".to_string(),
      135             segments: all_segments,
      136             needs_ocr_fallback: false,
      137         })
      138     }
      139 }
      140
      141 /// 从 slide*.xml 中提取所有 <a:t> 文字节点（非空）
      142 fn extract_texts_from_pptx_slide_xml(xml: &str) -> Result<Vec<String>, ExtractionError> {
      143     let mut reader = Reader::from_str(xml);
      144     reader.config_mut().trim_text(true);
      145
      146     let mut texts: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
      147     let mut in_a_t = false;
      148     let mut buf = Vec::new();
      149
      150     loop {
      151         match reader.read_event_into(&mut buf) {
      152             Ok(Event::Start(ref e)) => {
      153                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"a:t" {
      154                     in_a_t = true;
      155                 }
      156             }
      157             Ok(Event::Text(ref e)) if in_a_t => {
      158                 let text = e
      159                     .unescape()
      160                     .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("XML 解码失败: {e}")))?;
      161                 let trimmed = text.trim().to_string();
      162                 if !trimmed.is_empty() {
      163                     texts.push(trimmed);
      164                 }
      165             }
      166             Ok(Event::End(ref e)) => {
      167                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"a:t" {
      168                     in_a_t = false;
      169                 }
      170             }
      171             Ok(Event::Eof) => break,
      172             Err(e) => {
      173                 return Err(ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("PPTX XML 解析失败: {e}")));
      174             }
      175             _ => {}
      176         }
      177         buf.clear();
      178     }
      179
      180     Ok(texts)
      181 }
      182
      183 /// 从路径中提取幻灯片编号（ppt/slides/slide5.xml → 5）
      184 fn extract_slide_number(path: &str) -> u32 {
      185     // 找到最后一个 / 后的部分，再去掉 "slide" 前缀和 ".xml" 后缀
      186     let file_name = path.rsplit('/').next().unwrap_or(path);
      187     let without_ext = file_name.trim_end_matches(".xml");
      188     let without_prefix = without_ext.trim_start_matches("slide");
      189     without_prefix.parse::<u32>().unwrap_or(0)
      190 }
      191
      192 #[cfg(test)]
      193 mod tests {
      194     use super::*;
      195
      196     #[test]
      197     fn test_extract_slide_number() {
      198         assert_eq!(extract_slide_number("ppt/slides/slide1.xml"), 1);
      199         assert_eq!(extract_slide_number("ppt/slides/slide10.xml"), 10);
      200         assert_eq!(extract_slide_number("ppt/slides/slide2.xml"), 2);
      201     }

      203     #[test]
      204     fn test_extract_texts_empty() {

          ;
      206         let result = extract_texts_from_pptx_slide_xml(xml).unwrap();

      223   </p:cSld>
      224 </p:sld>"#;
      225         let result = extract_texts_from_pptx_slide_xml(xml).unwrap();
      226         assert_eq!(result.len(), 2);
      227         assert!(result.contains(&"标题文字".to_string()));

⏺ Now implement T05 — ASR FFI. First the Swift bridge:             
                                                      
⏺ Write(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/macos/asr_bridge.swif
       t)                                                                                                         
  ⎿  Wrote 103 lines to /Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/
     macos/asr_bridge.swift                                                                                       
        1 import Foundation                                                                                     
        2 import Speech                                                                                           
        3                                                                                                         
        4 /// 将音频文件转写为文字，同步阻塞直至完成（使用 DispatchSemaphore）                                  
        5 /// - 超时：600 秒（适合 10 分钟以内录音）                                                              
        6 /// - 返回 JSON：{"success": true, "text": "..."} 或 {"success": false, "error": "..."}               
        7 @_cdecl("transcribe_audio_file")                                                                      
        8 public func transcribeAudioFile(_ pathPtr: UnsafePointer<CChar>) -> UnsafeMutablePointer<CChar>?
          {
        9     let path = String(cString: pathPtr)
       10     let url = URL(fileURLWithPath: path)
       11
       12     // 检查文件是否存在
       13     guard FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: path) else {
       14         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: "音频文件不存在: \(path)")
       15     }
       16
       17     // 请求授权（同步等待）
       18     let authStatus = SFSpeechRecognizer.authorizationStatus()
       19     if authStatus == .notDetermined {
       20         let authSemaphore = DispatchSemaphore(value: 0)
       21         SFSpeechRecognizer.requestAuthorization { _ in authSemaphore.signal() }
       22         authSemaphore.wait()
       23     }
       24
       25     guard SFSpeechRecognizer.authorizationStatus() == .authorized else {
       26         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: "语音识别未获授权，请在系统偏好设置中允许")
       27     }
       28
       29     // 尝试中文识别器，失败则回退到英文
       30     guard let recognizer = SFSpeechRecognizer(locale: Locale(identifier: "zh-CN"))
       31                         ?? SFSpeechRecognizer(locale: Locale(identifier: "en-US")) else {
       32         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: "无法初始化语音识别器")
       33     }
       34
       35     guard recognizer.isAvailable else {
       36         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: "语音识别器当前不可用（可能需要网络或设备不支
          持）")
       37     }
       38
       39     let request = SFSpeechURLRecognitionRequest(url: url)
       40     request.shouldReportPartialResults = false
       41
       42     let semaphore = DispatchSemaphore(value: 0)
       43     var finalTranscription = ""
       44     var errorMessage: String? = nil
       45     var signalled = false
       46
       47     recognizer.recognitionTask(with: request) { result, error in
       48         guard !signalled else { return }
       49
       50         if let result = result {
       51             // 保存最新转写结果（partial 也缓存，以防 isFinal 未触发）
       52             finalTranscription = result.bestTranscription.formattedString
       53             if result.isFinal {
       54                 signalled = true
       55                 semaphore.signal()
       56                 return
       57             }
       58         }
       59
       60         if let error = error {
       61             // error 不一定致命，但如果 finalTranscription 也为空则记录
       62             if finalTranscription.isEmpty {
       63                 errorMessage = error.localizedDescription
       64             }
       65             if !signalled {
       66                 signalled = true
       67                 semaphore.signal()
       68             }
       69         }
       70     }
       71
       72     // 最长等待 600 秒
       73     let deadline = DispatchTime.now() + .seconds(600)
       74     if semaphore.wait(timeout: deadline) == .timedOut {
       75         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: "语音转写超时（超过 600 秒）")
       76     }
       77
       78     if finalTranscription.isEmpty {
       79         let msg = errorMessage ?? "转写结果为空（可能音频无语音内容）"
       80         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: msg)
       81     }
       82
       83     return makeAsrResult(success: true, text: finalTranscription)
       84 }
       85
       86 @_cdecl("free_asr_string")
       87 public func freeAsrString(_ ptr: UnsafeMutablePointer<CChar>?) {
       88     if let ptr = ptr {
       89         free(ptr)
       90     }
       91 }
       92
       93 private func makeAsrResult(success: Bool, text: String = "", error: String? = nil) -> UnsafeMutab
          lePointer<CChar>? {
       94     var dict: [String: Any] = ["success": success]
       95     if !text.isEmpty { dict["text"] = text }
       96     if let error = error { dict["error"] = error }
       97
       98     guard let data = try? JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict),
       99           let json = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) else {
      100         return strdup("{\"success\":false,\"error\":\"JSON 序列化失败\"}")
      101     }
      102     return strdup(json)
      103 }

⏺ Now the Rust ASR FFI:                                           
                                                      
⏺ Write(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/macos/asr_ffi.rs)
  ⎿  Wrote 44 lines to /Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/s     
     rc/macos/asr_ffi.rs                                           
       1 use std::ffi::{CStr, CString};                                                                           
       2 use std::os::raw::c_char;                                                                              
       3 use std::path::Path;                                                                                     
       4 use serde::Deserialize;                                          
       5                                                      
       6 extern "C" {                                                     
       7     fn transcribe_audio_file(path: *const c_char) -> *mut c_char;
       8     fn free_asr_string(ptr: *mut c_char);
       9 }                                                    
      10                                     
      11 #[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
      12 struct AsrResponse {                
      13     success: bool,   
      14     text: Option<String>,     
      15     error: Option<String>,
      16 }                             
      17 
      18 /// 调用 macOS SFSpeechRecognizer 对音频文件进行语音转写
      19 /// 返回转写文字；失败时返回 Err(描述)
      20 pub fn transcribe_audio(path: &Path) -> Result<String, String> {
      21     let path_str = path.to_str().ok_or("路径包含非 UTF-8 字符")?;
      22     let c_path = CString::new(path_str).map_err(|e| format!("路径转换失败: {e}"))?;
      23
      24     let result_ptr = unsafe { transcribe_audio_file(c_path.as_ptr()) };
      25     if result_ptr.is_null() {
      26         return Err("ASR 返回空指针".to_string());
      27     }
      28
      29     let result_str = unsafe { CStr::from_ptr(result_ptr) }
      30         .to_str()
      31         .map_err(|e| format!("ASR 结果非 UTF-8: {e}"))?
      32         .to_string();
      33
      34     unsafe { free_asr_string(result_ptr) };
      35
      36     let response: AsrResponse = serde_json::from_str(&result_str)
      37         .map_err(|e| format!("ASR JSON 解析失败: {e}"))?;
      38
      39     if !response.success {
      40         return Err(response.error.unwrap_or_else(|| "未知 ASR 错误".to_string()));
      41     }
      42
      43     Ok(response.text.unwrap_or_default())
      44 }

⏺ Now create the audio ASR extractor:                                     
                                                              
⏺ Write(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/extraction/extrac
       tors/audio_asr.rs)                                                                                         
  ⎿  Wrote 107 lines to /Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/
     src/extraction/extractors/audio_asr.rs                                                                       
        1 use std::path::Path;                                            
        2                     
        3 use crate::extraction::{                                                                                
        4     models::{ContentSegment, ExtractionError, ExtractionResult, ExtractOptions},
        5     Extractor,               
        6 };                                                              
        7                                    
        8 pub struct AudioAsrExtractor;
        9                                                     
       10 impl Extractor for AudioAsrExtractor {
       11     fn can_handle(&self, mime_type: &str) -> bool {
       12         // 仅在 macOS 上启用；非 macOS 构建永返 false
       13         #[cfg(target_os = "macos")]
       14         {
       15             matches!(
       16                 mime_type,   
       17                 "audio/mpeg" | "audio/mp4" | "audio/wav" | "audio/flac" | "audio/x-wav"
       18             )
       19         }
       20         #[cfg(not(target_os = "macos"))]
       21         {
       22             let _ = mime_type;
       23             false
       24         }
       25     }
       26
       27     fn name(&self) -> &'static str {
       28         "audio_asr"
       29     }
       30
       31     fn extract(
       32         &self,
       33         file_path: &Path,
       34         _options: &ExtractOptions,
       35     ) -> Result<ExtractionResult, ExtractionError> {
       36         #[cfg(target_os = "macos")]
       37         {
       38             let transcription = crate::macos::asr_ffi::transcribe_audio(file_path)
       39                 .map_err(ExtractionError::OcrError)?;
       40
       41             let transcription = transcription.trim().to_string();
       42
       43             if transcription.is_empty() {
       44                 return Ok(ExtractionResult {
       45                     raw_text: String::new(),
       46                     structured_md: String::new(),
       47                     quality_level: 0,
       48                     extractor_type: "audio_asr".to_string(),
       49                     segments: vec![],
       50                     needs_ocr_fallback: false,
       51                 });
       52             }
       53
       54             let segments = vec![ContentSegment {
       55                 segment_type: "asr_transcription".to_string(),
       56                 content: transcription.clone(),
       57                 page: None,
       58                 confidence: None,
       59                 bbox: None,
       60             }];
       61
       62             Ok(ExtractionResult {
       63                 raw_text: transcription.clone(),
       64                 structured_md: transcription,
       65                 quality_level: 1,
       66                 extractor_type: "audio_asr".to_string(),
       67                 segments,
       68                 needs_ocr_fallback: false,
       69             })
       70         }
       71
       72         #[cfg(not(target_os = "macos"))]
       73         {
       74             Err(ExtractionError::UnsupportedPlatform)
       75         }
       76     }
       77 }
       78
       79 #[cfg(test)]
       80 mod tests {
       81     use super::*;
       82
       83     #[test]
       84     fn test_can_handle_audio_types() {
       85         let extractor = AudioAsrExtractor;
       86         // 在 macOS 上应该能处理
       87         #[cfg(target_os = "macos")]
       88         {
       89             assert!(extractor.can_handle("audio/mpeg"));
       90             assert!(extractor.can_handle("audio/mp4"));
       91             assert!(extractor.can_handle("audio/wav"));
       92             assert!(extractor.can_handle("audio/flac"));
       93         }
       94         // 不处理非音频类型
       95         assert!(!extractor.can_handle("application/pdf"));
       96         assert!(!extractor.can_handle("image/jpeg"));
       97         assert!(!extractor.can_handle(""));
       98     }
       99
      100     #[test]
      101     #[cfg(not(target_os = "macos"))]
      102     fn test_can_handle_returns_false_on_non_macos() {
      103         let extractor = AudioAsrExtractor;
      104         assert!(!extractor.can_handle("audio/mpeg"));
      105         assert!(!extractor.can_handle("audio/mp4"));
      106     }
      107 }

⏺ Now add the materialize_md function to scheduler.rs:             
                                                      
⏺ Update(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/extraction/sched

⏺ Read(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/extraction/schedul
  er.rs · lines 238-252)                                                                                          
  ⎿  Read 15 lines                                                                                              
                                                                                                                  
⏺ Update(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/extraction/sched
        uler.rs)                                                                                                  
  ⎿  Added 85 lines                                                                                               
      251          db_ext::reset_running_tasks(&conn)                                                             
      252      }                                                                                                  
      253  }                                                                                                      
      254 +                                                                                                     
      255 +/// 将提取结果物化为 .md 文件，并在数据库中创建衍生 Asset，最后发送事件通知前端                      
      256 +/// 失败时仅记录 warn，不影响原件提取成功流程                                                   
      257 +fn materialize_md(app: &AppHandle, source_asset: &crate::models::Asset, md_content: &str) {     
      258 +    // 确保工作区目录存在                                                                       
      259 +    let workspace_dir = match crate::workspace::ensure_project_workspace(&source_asset.project_i
          +d) {                                                                                            
      260 +        Ok(d) => d,                                                                             
      261 +        Err(e) => {                                                                             
      262 +            log::warn!("物化 MD：无法创建工作区目录: {e}");                                     
      263 +            return;                                                                             
      264 +        }                                                                                       
      265 +    };                                                                                          
      266 +                                                                                                
      267 +    // 取原件文件名 stem（不含扩展名）                                                          
      268 +    let stem = Path::new(&source_asset.name)                                                    
      269 +        .file_stem()                                                                            
      270 +        .and_then(|s| s.to_str())                                                               
      271 +        .unwrap_or("content")                                                                   
      272 +        .to_string();                                                                           
      273 +                                                                                                
      274 +    let derived_id = Uuid::new_v4().to_string();                                                
      275 +    let md_display_name = format!("{stem}.md");                                                 
      276 +    let md_file_name = format!("{derived_id}_{stem}.md");                                       
      277 +    let md_path = workspace_dir.join(&md_file_name);                                            
      278 +                                                                                                
      279 +    // 写出 .md 文件                                                                            
      280 +    if let Err(e) = std::fs::write(&md_path, md_content) {                                      
      281 +        log::warn!("物化 MD：写出文件失败 {}: {e}", md_path.display());                         
      282 +        return;                                                                                 
      283 +    }                                                                                           
      284 +                                                                                                
      285 +    let file_size = md_content.len() as i64;                                                    
      286 +    let now = chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339();                                                  
      287 +                                                                                                
      288 +    let derived_asset = crate::models::Asset {                                                  
      289 +        id: derived_id.clone(),                                                                 
      290 +        project_id: source_asset.project_id.clone(),                                            
      291 +        asset_type: "markdown".to_string(),                                                     
      292 +        name: md_display_name.clone(),                                                          
      293 +        original_name: md_display_name,                                                         
      294 +        file_path: md_path.to_string_lossy().to_string(),                                       
      295 +        file_size,                                                                              
      296 +        mime_type: "text/markdown".to_string(),                                                 
      297 +        captured_at: now.clone(),                                                               
      298 +        imported_at: now,                                                                       
      299 +        source_type: "converted_from".to_string(),                                              
      300 +        source_data: Some(source_asset.id.clone()),                                             
      301 +        is_starred: false,                                                                      
      302 +        source_asset_id: Some(source_asset.id.clone()),                                         
      303 +    };                                                                                          
      304 +                                                                                                
      305 +    let db = app.state::<Database>();                                                           
      306 +    match db.conn.lock() {                                                                      
      307 +        Ok(conn) => {                                                                           
      308 +            if let Err(e) = crate::db::asset::insert(&conn, &derived_asset) {                   
      309 +                log::warn!("物化 MD：写入衍生 Asset 失败: {e}");                                
      310 +                // 文件已写出但 DB 写入失败，删除磁盘文件保持一致性                             
      311 +                let _ = std::fs::remove_file(&md_path);                                         
      312 +                return;                                                                         
      313 +            }                                                                                   
      314 +        }                                                                                       
      315 +        Err(e) => {                                                                             
      316 +            log::warn!("物化 MD：DB 锁失败: {e}");                                              
      317 +            let _ = std::fs::remove_file(&md_path);                                             
      318 +            return;                                                                             
      319 +        }                                                                                       
      320 +    }                                                                                           
      321 +                                                                                                
      322 +    // 通知前端：有新衍生 Asset 产出                                                            
      323 +    let _ = app.emit(                                                                           
      324 +        "notecapt/asset-converted",                                                             
      325 +        serde_json::json!({                                                                     
      326 +            "sourceAssetId": source_asset.id,                                                   
      327 +            "derivedAssetId": derived_id,                                                       
      328 +            "projectId": source_asset.project_id,                                               
      329 +        }),                                                                                     
      330 +    );                                                                                          
      331 +                                                                                                
      332 +    log::info!(                                                                                 
      333 +        "物化 MD 成功: {} -> {} ({})",                                                          
      334 +        source_asset.id,                                                                        
      335 +        derived_id,                                                                             
      336 +        md_path.display()                                                                       
      337 +    );                                                                                          
      338 +}

       93 +/** 从 assets 列表中查找衍生 Asset 的原件名称 */                                                     
       94 +function resolveSourceName(asset: Asset, allAssets: Asset[]): string | null {                        
       95 +  const sourceId = (asset as Asset & { sourceAssetId?: string | null }).sourceAssetId;          
       96 +  if (!sourceId) return null;                                                                   
       97 +  const source = allAssets.find((a) => a.id === sourceId);                                      
       98 +  return source ? source.name : null;                                                           
       99 +}                                                                                               
      100 +

      102  function sortByImportedAtDesc(assets: Asset[]): Asset[] {
      103    const list = [...assets];

       49
       50 ---
       51
       52 ## 3. 关键设计决策
       53
       54 ### 3.1 物化触发条件
       55 ```
       56 quality_level >= 1 AND structured_md != ""
       57 ```
       58 在 `scheduler.rs` 的 `Ok(Ok(extraction_result))` 分支末尾，同步执行（不另启协程）。
       59
       60 ### 3.2 衍生 Asset 路径
       61 ```
       62 ~/Downloads/NoteCaptWorkPlace/<project_id>/<derived_asset_id>_<stem>.md
       63 ```
       64 - `<stem>` 取自原件 `asset.name` 的 file_stem
       65 - 路径与其他工作区文件一致，前端 `WorkspaceFolderStrip` 可正常枚举
       66
       67 ### 3.3 衍生 Asset 字段
       68 ```rust
       69 Asset {
       70     asset_type: "markdown",
       71     source_type: "converted_from",
       72     source_data: Some(source_asset_id),   // 冗余，便于旧代码读取
       73     source_asset_id: Some(source_asset_id),
       74     mime_type: "text/markdown",
       75     ...
       76 }
       77 ```
       78
       79 ### 3.4 失败降级策略
       80 写出 .md 或插入衍生 Asset 失败时：
       81 - 仅 `log::warn!`，不阻断主流程
       82 - 若文件写出成功但 DB 写入失败，删除磁盘文件（保持一致性）
       83
       84 ### 3.5 ASR FFI 策略
       85 - 编译为独立静态库 `libasr_bridge.a`（与 `libocr_bridge.a` 分离）
       86 - 使用 `DispatchSemaphore` 将 async SFSpeechRecognizer 转为同步 FFI 调用
       87 - 超时保护：600 秒（适合 10 分钟以内录音）
       88 - 非 macOS：`audio_asr.rs` 的 `can_handle` 永返 false，整个 ASR 路径编译时排除
       89
       90 ### 3.6 MIME 类型
       91 | 扩展名 | asset_type | mime_type |
       92 |--------|-----------|-----------|
       93 | .docx | "document" | "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document"
          |
       94 | .pptx | "presentation" | "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presenta
          tion" |
       95 | .mp3 | "audio_clip" | "audio/mpeg" |（已有）
       96 | .m4a/.aac | "audio_clip" | "audio/mp4" |（已有）
       97 | .wav | "audio_clip" | "audio/wav" |（已有）
       98
       99 ---
      100
      101 ## 4. 接口规范
      102
      103 ### `db::asset::insert`（不变签名，内部增加 source_asset_id 列）
      104 ```rust
      105 pub fn insert(conn: &Connection, a: &Asset) -> Result<(), String>
      106 ```
      107
      108 ### `notecapt/asset-converted` 事件 payload
      109 ```json
      110 {
      111   "sourceAssetId": "uuid",
      112   "derivedAssetId": "uuid",
      113   "projectId": "uuid"
      114 }
      115 ```
      116
      117 ### ASR FFI（Rust 侧）
      118 ```rust
      119 // macos/asr_ffi.rs
      120 pub fn transcribe_audio(path: &Path) -> Result<String, String>
      121 ```
      122
      123 ---
      124
      125 ## 5. 风险提示
      126
      127 | 风险 | 缓解 |
      128 |------|------|
      129 | SFSpeechRecognizer 授权弹窗 | 首次调用时系统自动弹出；Info.plist 需加 NSSpeechRecognitionUsageD
          escription |
      130 | quick-xml crate 编译时间增加 | 可接受，与 zip crate 一起引入 |
      131 | PPTX 幻灯片顺序不确定 | slide 文件名排序后按序解析，如 slide1.xml < slide2.xml < slide10.xml（
          自然数排序） |
      132 | 衍生 MD 重复创建 | scheduler 每次成功提取都会尝试创建，通过检查同 project_id + source_asset_id
          是否已存在来防重（本期简化：直接插入，利用 DB 唯一约束）|
      133
      134 > 注：本期「重复创建」问题通过 DB 层唯一索引解决方案可在 V7 migration 中补充；本期 V6 先不加 UNIQ
          UE 约束，让旧数据无影响。

⏺ Write(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/extraction/extrac
       tors/docx.rs)
  ⎿  Wrote 176 lines to /Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/
     src/extraction/extractors/docx.rs
        1 use std::io::Read;
        2 use std::path::Path;
        3
        4 use quick_xml::events::Event;
        5 use quick_xml::Reader;
        6
        7 use crate::extraction::{
        8     models::{ContentSegment, ExtractionError, ExtractionResult, ExtractOptions},
        9     Extractor,
       10 };
       11
       12 pub struct DocxExtractor;
       13
       14 impl Extractor for DocxExtractor {
       15     fn can_handle(&self, mime_type: &str) -> bool {
       16         mime_type == "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document"
       17     }
       18
       19     fn name(&self) -> &'static str {
       20         "docx"
       21     }
       22
       23     fn extract(
       24         &self,
       25         file_path: &Path,
       26         _options: &ExtractOptions,
       27     ) -> Result<ExtractionResult, ExtractionError> {
       28         let file = std::fs::File::open(file_path)?;
       29         let mut archive = zip::ZipArchive::new(file)
       30             .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("DOCX zip 打开失败: {e}")))?;
       31
       32         // 读取 word/document.xml
       33         let xml_content = {
       34             let mut entry = archive
       35                 .by_name("word/document.xml")
       36                 .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("找不到 word/document.xml: {e}")
          ))?;
       37             let mut buf = String::new();
       38             entry
       39                 .read_to_string(&mut buf)
       40                 .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("读取 document.xml 失败: {e}")))
          ?;
       41             buf
       42         };
       43
       44         let paragraphs = extract_paragraphs_from_docx_xml(&xml_content)?;
       45
       46         if paragraphs.is_empty() {
       47             return Ok(ExtractionResult {
       48                 raw_text: String::new(),
       49                 structured_md: String::new(),
       50                 quality_level: 0,
       51                 extractor_type: "docx".to_string(),
       52                 segments: vec![],
       53                 needs_ocr_fallback: false,
       54             });
       55         }
       56
       57         let segments: Vec<ContentSegment> = paragraphs
       58             .iter()
       59             .enumerate()
       60             .map(|(i, p)| ContentSegment {
       61                 segment_type: "paragraph".to_string(),
       62                 content: p.clone(),
       63                 page: Some((i as u32 / 10) + 1),
       64                 confidence: None,
       65                 bbox: None,
       66             })
       67             .collect();
       68
       69         let raw_text = paragraphs.join("\n");
       70         let structured_md = paragraphs.join("\n\n");
       71
       72         Ok(ExtractionResult {
       73             raw_text,
       74             structured_md,
       75             quality_level: 1,
       76             extractor_type: "docx".to_string(),
       77             segments,
       78             needs_ocr_fallback: false,
       79         })
       80     }
       81 }
       82
       83 /// 从 word/document.xml 的 XML 字符串中提取段落文字
       84 fn extract_paragraphs_from_docx_xml(xml: &str) -> Result<Vec<String>, ExtractionError> {
       85     let mut reader = Reader::from_str(xml);
       86     reader.config_mut().trim_text(true);
       87
       88     let mut paragraphs: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
       89     let mut current_para = String::new();
       90     let mut in_w_t = false;
       91     let mut buf = Vec::new();
       92
       93     loop {
       94         match reader.read_event_into(&mut buf) {
       95             Ok(Event::Start(ref e)) => {
       96                 // <w:p> — 新段落开始
       97                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"w:p" {
       98                     current_para.clear();
       99                 }
      100                 // <w:t> — 文字节点开始
      101                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"w:t" {
      102                     in_w_t = true;
      103                 }
      104             }
      105             Ok(Event::Text(ref e)) if in_w_t => {
      106                 let text = e
      107                     .unescape()
      108                     .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("XML 解码失败: {e}")))?;
      109                 current_para.push_str(&text);
      110             }
      111             Ok(Event::End(ref e)) => {
      112                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"w:t" {
      113                     in_w_t = false;
      114                 }
      115                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"w:p" {
      116                     let trimmed = current_para.trim().to_string();
      117                     if !trimmed.is_empty() {
      118                         paragraphs.push(trimmed);
      119                     }
      120                     current_para.clear();
      121                 }
      122             }
      123             Ok(Event::Empty(ref e)) => {
      124                 // 处理自闭合的 <w:t/>（通常是空格）
      125                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"w:t" {
      126                     // 空文字节点，不处理
      127                 }
      128             }
      129             Ok(Event::Eof) => break,
      130             Err(e) => {
      131                 return Err(ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("DOCX XML 解析失败: {e}")));
      132             }
      133             _ => {}
      134         }
      135         buf.clear();
      136     }
      137
      138     Ok(paragraphs)
      139 }
      140
      141 #[cfg(test)]
      142 mod tests {
      143     use super::*;
      144
      145     #[test]
      146     fn test_extract_paragraphs_empty_xml() {
      147         let xml = r#"<?xml version="1.0"?><w:document><w:body></w:body></w:document>"#;
      148         let result = extract_paragraphs_from_docx_xml(xml).unwrap();
      149         assert!(result.is_empty());
      150     }
      151
      152     #[test]
      153     fn test_extract_paragraphs_with_text() {
      154         let xml = r#"<?xml version="1.0"?>
      155 <w:document xmlns:w="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main">
      156   <w:body>
      157     <w:p><w:r><w:t>Hello World</w:t></w:r></w:p>
      158     <w:p><w:r><w:t>Second paragraph</w:t></w:r></w:p>
      159   </w:body>
      160 </w:document>"#;
      161         let result = extract_paragraphs_from_docx_xml(xml).unwrap();
      162         assert_eq!(result.len(), 2);
      163         assert_eq!(result[0], "Hello World");
      164         assert_eq!(result[1], "Second paragraph");
      165     }

      169         let extractor = DocxExtractor;
      170         assert!(extractor.can_handle(
      171             "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document"
      172         ));
      173         assert!(!extractor.can_handle("application/pdf"));
      174         assert!(!extractor.can_handle(""));
      175     }

⏺ Write(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/extraction/extrac
       tors/pptx.rs)
  ⎿  Wrote 239 lines to /Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/
     src/extraction/extractors/pptx.rs
        1 use std::io::Read;
        2 use std::path::Path;
        3
        4 use quick_xml::events::Event;
        5 use quick_xml::Reader;
        6
        7 use crate::extraction::{
        8     models::{ContentSegment, ExtractionError, ExtractionResult, ExtractOptions},
        9     Extractor,
       10 };
       11
       12 pub struct PptxExtractor;
       13
       14 impl Extractor for PptxExtractor {
       15     fn can_handle(&self, mime_type: &str) -> bool {
       16         mime_type
       17             == "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation"
       18     }
       19
       20     fn name(&self) -> &'static str {
       21         "pptx"
       22     }
       23
       24     fn extract(
       25         &self,
       26         file_path: &Path,
       27         _options: &ExtractOptions,
       28     ) -> Result<ExtractionResult, ExtractionError> {
       29         let file = std::fs::File::open(file_path)?;
       30         let mut archive = zip::ZipArchive::new(file)
       31             .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("PPTX zip 打开失败: {e}")))?;
       32
       33         // 枚举所有 ppt/slides/slide*.xml 文件名，按自然数排序
       34         let mut slide_names: Vec<String> = (0..archive.len())
       35             .filter_map(|i| {
       36                 let entry = archive.by_index(i).ok()?;
       37                 let name = entry.name().to_string();
       38                 if name.starts_with("ppt/slides/slide")
       39                     && name.ends_with(".xml")
       40                     && !name.contains("_rels")
       41                     && !name.contains("slideLayout")
       42                     && !name.contains("slideMaster")
       43                 {
       44                     Some(name)
       45                 } else {
       46                     None
       47                 }
       48             })
       49             .collect();
       50
       51         // 自然数排序：slide1.xml < slide2.xml < ... < slide10.xml
       52         slide_names.sort_by(|a, b| {
       53             let num_a = extract_slide_number(a);
       54             let num_b = extract_slide_number(b);
       55             num_a.cmp(&num_b)
       56         });
       57
       58         if slide_names.is_empty() {
       59             return Ok(ExtractionResult {
       60                 raw_text: String::new(),
       61                 structured_md: String::new(),
       62                 quality_level: 0,
       63                 extractor_type: "pptx".to_string(),
       64                 segments: vec![],
       65                 needs_ocr_fallback: false,
       66             });
       67         }
       68
       69         let mut all_segments: Vec<ContentSegment> = Vec::new();
       70         let mut md_sections: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
       71
       72         for (slide_idx, slide_name) in slide_names.iter().enumerate() {
       73             let slide_num = slide_idx + 1;
       74
       75             let xml_content = {
       76                 let mut entry = archive
       77                     .by_name(slide_name)
       78                     .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("读取幻灯片 {slide_name} 失
          败: {e}")))?;
       79                 let mut buf = String::new();
       80                 entry
       81                     .read_to_string(&mut buf)
       82                     .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("读取幻灯片 XML 失败: {e}"))
          )?;
       83                 buf
       84             };
       85
       86             let texts = extract_texts_from_pptx_slide_xml(&xml_content)?;
       87
       88             if texts.is_empty() {
       89                 continue;
       90             }
       91
       92             // 每张幻灯片生成一个 ## 二级标题段
       93             let mut section = format!("## Slide {slide_num}");
       94             for text in &texts {
       95                 section.push('\n');
       96                 section.push_str(text);
       97             }
       98             md_sections.push(section);
       99
      100             for text in texts {
      101                 all_segments.push(ContentSegment {
      102                     segment_type: "slide_text".to_string(),
      103                     content: text,
      104                     page: Some(slide_num as u32),
      105                     confidence: None,
      106                     bbox: None,
      107                 });
      108             }
      109         }
      110
      111         if md_sections.is_empty() {
      112             return Ok(ExtractionResult {
      113                 raw_text: String::new(),
      114                 structured_md: String::new(),
      115                 quality_level: 0,
      116                 extractor_type: "pptx".to_string(),
      117                 segments: vec![],
      118                 needs_ocr_fallback: false,
      119             });
      120         }
      121
      122         let raw_text = all_segments
      123             .iter()
      124             .map(|s| s.content.as_str())
      125             .collect::<Vec<_>>()
      126             .join("\n");
      127
      128         let structured_md = md_sections.join("\n\n");
      129
      130         Ok(ExtractionResult {
      131             raw_text,
      132             structured_md,
      133             quality_level: 2, // 有结构（## 标题）
      134             extractor_type: "pptx".to_string(),
      135             segments: all_segments,
      136             needs_ocr_fallback: false,
      137         })
      138     }
      139 }
      140
      141 /// 从 slide*.xml 中提取所有 <a:t> 文字节点（非空）
      142 fn extract_texts_from_pptx_slide_xml(xml: &str) -> Result<Vec<String>, ExtractionError> {
      143     let mut reader = Reader::from_str(xml);
      144     reader.config_mut().trim_text(true);
      145
      146     let mut texts: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
      147     let mut in_a_t = false;
      148     let mut buf = Vec::new();
      149
      150     loop {
      151         match reader.read_event_into(&mut buf) {
      152             Ok(Event::Start(ref e)) => {
      153                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"a:t" {
      154                     in_a_t = true;
      155                 }
      156             }
      157             Ok(Event::Text(ref e)) if in_a_t => {
      158                 let text = e
      159                     .unescape()
      160                     .map_err(|e| ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("XML 解码失败: {e}")))?;
      161                 let trimmed = text.trim().to_string();
      162                 if !trimmed.is_empty() {
      163                     texts.push(trimmed);
      164                 }
      165             }
      166             Ok(Event::End(ref e)) => {
      167                 if e.name().as_ref() == b"a:t" {
      168                     in_a_t = false;
      169                 }
      170             }
      171             Ok(Event::Eof) => break,
      172             Err(e) => {
      173                 return Err(ExtractionError::ParseError(format!("PPTX XML 解析失败: {e}")));
      174             }
      175             _ => {}
      176         }
      177         buf.clear();
      178     }
      179
      180     Ok(texts)
      181 }
      182
      183 /// 从路径中提取幻灯片编号（ppt/slides/slide5.xml → 5）
      184 fn extract_slide_number(path: &str) -> u32 {
      185     // 找到最后一个 / 后的部分，再去掉 "slide" 前缀和 ".xml" 后缀
      186     let file_name = path.rsplit('/').next().unwrap_or(path);
      187     let without_ext = file_name.trim_end_matches(".xml");
      188     let without_prefix = without_ext.trim_start_matches("slide");
      189     without_prefix.parse::<u32>().unwrap_or(0)
      190 }
      191
      192 #[cfg(test)]
      193 mod tests {
      194     use super::*;
      195
      196     #[test]
      197     fn test_extract_slide_number() {
      198         assert_eq!(extract_slide_number("ppt/slides/slide1.xml"), 1);
      199         assert_eq!(extract_slide_number("ppt/slides/slide10.xml"), 10);
      200         assert_eq!(extract_slide_number("ppt/slides/slide2.xml"), 2);
      201     }

      204     fn test_extract_texts_empty() {

          ;
      206         let result = extract_texts_from_pptx_slide_xml(xml).unwrap();

⏺ Now implement T05 — ASR FFI. First the Swift bridge:

⏺ Write(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/macos/asr_bridge.swif
       t)
  ⎿  Wrote 103 lines to /Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/
     macos/asr_bridge.swift
        1 import Foundation
        2 import Speech
        3
        4 /// 将音频文件转写为文字，同步阻塞直至完成（使用 DispatchSemaphore）
        5 /// - 超时：600 秒（适合 10 分钟以内录音）
        6 /// - 返回 JSON：{"success": true, "text": "..."} 或 {"success": false, "error": "..."}
        7 @_cdecl("transcribe_audio_file")
        8 public func transcribeAudioFile(_ pathPtr: UnsafePointer<CChar>) -> UnsafeMutablePointer<CChar>?
          {
        9     let path = String(cString: pathPtr)
       10     let url = URL(fileURLWithPath: path)
       11
       12     // 检查文件是否存在
       13     guard FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: path) else {
       14         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: "音频文件不存在: \(path)")
       15     }
       16
       17     // 请求授权（同步等待）
       18     let authStatus = SFSpeechRecognizer.authorizationStatus()
       19     if authStatus == .notDetermined {
       20         let authSemaphore = DispatchSemaphore(value: 0)
       21         SFSpeechRecognizer.requestAuthorization { _ in authSemaphore.signal() }
       22         authSemaphore.wait()
       23     }
       24
       25     guard SFSpeechRecognizer.authorizationStatus() == .authorized else {
       26         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: "语音识别未获授权，请在系统偏好设置中允许")
       27     }
       28
       29     // 尝试中文识别器，失败则回退到英文
       30     guard let recognizer = SFSpeechRecognizer(locale: Locale(identifier: "zh-CN"))
       31                         ?? SFSpeechRecognizer(locale: Locale(identifier: "en-US")) else {
       32         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: "无法初始化语音识别器")
       33     }
       34
       35     guard recognizer.isAvailable else {
       36         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: "语音识别器当前不可用（可能需要网络或设备不支
          持）")
       37     }
       38
       39     let request = SFSpeechURLRecognitionRequest(url: url)
       40     request.shouldReportPartialResults = false
       41
       42     let semaphore = DispatchSemaphore(value: 0)
       43     var finalTranscription = ""
       44     var errorMessage: String? = nil
       45     var signalled = false
       46
       47     recognizer.recognitionTask(with: request) { result, error in
       48         guard !signalled else { return }
       49
       50         if let result = result {
       51             // 保存最新转写结果（partial 也缓存，以防 isFinal 未触发）
       52             finalTranscription = result.bestTranscription.formattedString
       53             if result.isFinal {
       54                 signalled = true
       55                 semaphore.signal()
       56                 return
       57             }
       58         }
       59
       60         if let error = error {
       61             // error 不一定致命，但如果 finalTranscription 也为空则记录
       62             if finalTranscription.isEmpty {
       63                 errorMessage = error.localizedDescription
       64             }
       65             if !signalled {
       66                 signalled = true
       67                 semaphore.signal()
       68             }
       69         }
       70     }
       71
       72     // 最长等待 600 秒
       73     let deadline = DispatchTime.now() + .seconds(600)
       74     if semaphore.wait(timeout: deadline) == .timedOut {
       75         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: "语音转写超时（超过 600 秒）")
       76     }
       77
       78     if finalTranscription.isEmpty {
       79         let msg = errorMessage ?? "转写结果为空（可能音频无语音内容）"
       80         return makeAsrResult(success: false, error: msg)
       81     }
       82
       83     return makeAsrResult(success: true, text: finalTranscription)
       84 }
       85
       86 @_cdecl("free_asr_string")
       87 public func freeAsrString(_ ptr: UnsafeMutablePointer<CChar>?) {
       88     if let ptr = ptr {
       89         free(ptr)
       90     }
       91 }
       92
       93 private func makeAsrResult(success: Bool, text: String = "", error: String? = nil) -> UnsafeMutab
          lePointer<CChar>? {
       94     var dict: [String: Any] = ["success": success]
       95     if !text.isEmpty { dict["text"] = text }
       96     if let error = error { dict["error"] = error }
       97
       98     guard let data = try? JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict),
       99           let json = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) else {
      100         return strdup("{\"success\":false,\"error\":\"JSON 序列化失败\"}")
      101     }
      102     return strdup(json)
      103 }

⏺ Now the Rust ASR FFI:

⏺ Write(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/macos/asr_ffi.rs)
  ⎿  Wrote 44 lines to /Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/s
     rc/macos/asr_ffi.rs
       1 use std::ffi::{CStr, CString};
       2 use std::os::raw::c_char;
       3 use std::path::Path;
       4 use serde::Deserialize;
       5
       6 extern "C" {
       7     fn transcribe_audio_file(path: *const c_char) -> *mut c_char;
       8     fn free_asr_string(ptr: *mut c_char);
       9 }
      10
      11 #[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
      12 struct AsrResponse {
      13     success: bool,
      14     text: Option<String>,
      15     error: Option<String>,
      16 }
      17
      18 /// 调用 macOS SFSpeechRecognizer 对音频文件进行语音转写
      19 /// 返回转写文字；失败时返回 Err(描述)
      20 pub fn transcribe_audio(path: &Path) -> Result<String, String> {
      21     let path_str = path.to_str().ok_or("路径包含非 UTF-8 字符")?;
      22     let c_path = CString::new(path_str).map_err(|e| format!("路径转换失败: {e}"))?;
      23
      24     let result_ptr = unsafe { transcribe_audio_file(c_path.as_ptr()) };
      25     if result_ptr.is_null() {
      26         return Err("ASR 返回空指针".to_string());
      27     }
      28
      29     let result_str = unsafe { CStr::from_ptr(result_ptr) }
      30         .to_str()
      31         .map_err(|e| format!("ASR 结果非 UTF-8: {e}"))?
      32         .to_string();
      33
      34     unsafe { free_asr_string(result_ptr) };
      35
      36     let response: AsrResponse = serde_json::from_str(&result_str)
      37         .map_err(|e| format!("ASR JSON 解析失败: {e}"))?;
      38
      39     if !response.success {
      40         return Err(response.error.unwrap_or_else(|| "未知 ASR 错误".to_string()));
      41     }
      42
      43     Ok(response.text.unwrap_or_default())
      44 }

⏺ Now create the audio ASR extractor:

⏺ Write(/Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/src/extraction/extrac
       tors/audio_asr.rs)
  ⎿  Wrote 107 lines to /Users/zhongjiacheng/Documents/project/办公桌/NCdesktop/项目启动/NCdesktop/src-tauri/
     src/extraction/extractors/audio_asr.rs
        1 use std::path::Path;
        2
        3 use crate::extraction::{
        4     models::{ContentSegment, ExtractionError, ExtractionResult, ExtractOptions},
        5     Extractor,
        6 };
        7
        8 pub struct AudioAsrExtractor;
        9
       10 impl Extractor for AudioAsrExtractor {
       11     fn can_handle(&self, mime_type: &str) -> bool {
       12         // 仅在 macOS 上启用；非 macOS 构建永返 false
       13         #[cfg(target_os = "macos")]
       14         {
       15             matches!(
       16                 mime_type,
       17                 "audio/mpeg" | "audio/mp4" | "audio/wav" | "audio/flac" | "audio/x-wav"
       18             )
       19         }
       20         #[cfg(not(target_os = "macos"))]
       21         {
       22             let _ = mime_type;
       23             false
       24         }
       25     }
       26
       27     fn name(&self) -> &'static str {
       28         "audio_asr"
       29     }
       30
       31     fn extract(
       32         &self,
       33         file_path: &Path,
       34         _options: &ExtractOptions,
       35     ) -> Result<ExtractionResult, ExtractionError> {
       36         #[cfg(target_os = "macos")]
       37         {
       38             let transcription = crate::macos::asr_ffi::transcribe_audio(file_path)
       39                 .map_err(ExtractionError::OcrError)?;
       40
       41             let transcription = transcription.trim().to_string();
       42
       43             if transcription.is_empty() {
       44                 return Ok(ExtractionResult {
       45                     raw_text: String::new(),
       46                     structured_md: String::new(),
       47                     quality_level: 0,
       48                     extractor_type: "audio_asr".to_string(),
       49                     segments: vec![],
       50                     needs_ocr_fallback: false,
       51                 });
       52             }
       53
       54             let segments = vec![ContentSegment {
       55                 segment_type: "asr_transcription".to_string(),
       56                 content: transcription.clone(),
       57                 page: None,
       58                 confidence: None,
       59                 bbox: None,
       60             }];
       61
       62             Ok(ExtractionResult {
       63                 raw_text: transcription.clone(),
       64                 structured_md: transcription,
       65                 quality_level: 1,
       66                 extractor_type: "audio_asr".to_string(),
       67                 segments,
       68                 needs_ocr_fallback: false,
       69             })
       70         }
       71
       72         #[cfg(not(target_os = "macos"))]
       73         {
       74             Err(ExtractionError::UnsupportedPlatform)
       75         }
       76     }
       77 }
       78
       79 #[cfg(test)]
       80 mod tests {
       81     use super::*;
       82
       83     #[test]
       84     fn test_can_handle_audio_types() {
       85         let extractor = AudioAsrExtractor;
       86         // 在 macOS 上应该能处理
       87         #[cfg(target_os = "macos")]
       88         {
       89             assert!(extractor.can_handle("audio/mpeg"));
       90             assert!(extractor.can_handle("audio/mp4"));
       91             assert!(extractor.can_handle("audio/wav"));
       92             assert!(extractor.can_handle("audio/flac"));
       93         }
       94         // 不处理非音频类型
       95         assert!(!extractor.can_handle("application/pdf"));
       96         assert!(!extractor.can_handle("image/jpeg"));
       97         assert!(!extractor.can_handle(""));
       98     }
       99
      100     #[test]
      101     #[cfg(not(target_os = "macos"))]
      102     fn test_can_handle_returns_false_on_non_macos() {
      103         let extractor = AudioAsrExtractor;
      104         assert!(!extractor.can_handle("audio/mpeg"));
      105         assert!(!extractor.can_handle("audio/mp4"));
      106     }
      107 }

⏺ Now add the materialize_md function to scheduler.rs:
